sourceOverview.notes: Budget TTS + STT (Whisper-based). Very cheap. Developer-friendly.

activeModelsSummary.tts: Lemonfox TTS [tts] — Public docs are less granular on named TTS models

audit.priceRangeSummary: Examples: $5/month includes ~30h STT or ~2M TTS chars; extra ~$0.50 per 1M credits = ~3h STT or ~200k TTS chars. STT also promoted at ~$0.50 per 3 hours.
audit.limitsSummary: Language support is broad for STT, but public model granularity is lighter than larger vendors.
audit.regionSummary: Cloud provider; public region detail sparse.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: Public marketing suggests multilingual TTS, but exact official language matrix needs live validation.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Useful budget option, but metadata is relatively coarse. You may need more manual validation before exposing advanced controls.

supplementalResearch.title: 54. Lemonfox.ai (US/EU) — TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 54. Lemonfox.ai (US/EU) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Budget pricing. **Drop-in replacement** for OpenAI and ElevenLabs APIs.

STT: ~$0.17/hr (Whisper v3, 100+ languages). TTS: **$2.50/1M chars** (8 languages, 50+ voices). EU processing option (+20% surcharge). First month free (30 hrs STT). Speaker diarization. OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
